allies.rationale_text: Leverage-points gives tipping-points a concrete systems lens for locating where a small intervention can unlock disproportionate change.
allies.source_quote: Leverage points are places to intervene in a system where minimum effort can lead to maximum possible change.

allies.rationale_text: First-principles-thinking helps tipping-points strip away default assumptions so the real threshold condition can be seen and tested.
allies.source_quote: By stripping away conventional assumptions ... this method facilitates the breakthrough novel solutions needed to find a non-obvious tipping point.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Tipping-points conflicts with status-quo-bias when slow drift is misread as stable equilibrium near a threshold.
structured_tensions.source_quote: tipping-points vs status-quo-bias: tipping-points conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when slow drift is misread as stable equilibrium near threshold.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Tipping-points conflicts with representativeness-heuristic when recent normal patterns obscure an approaching regime shift.
structured_tensions.source_quote: tipping-points vs representativeness-heuristic: tipping-points conflicts with representativeness-heuristic (representativeness heuristic) when recent normal patterns obscure approaching regime shift.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Tipping-points conflicts with confirmation-bias when teams force incoming signals to fit the expected threshold story instead of testing whether the shift is real.
structured_tensions.source_quote: tipping-points vs confirmation-bias: tipping-points conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when prediction errors and misread signals are filtered to fit the expected threshold narrative rather than honestly assessed.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved one leverage ally, one first-principles ally, and the explicit threshold-misreading tension block.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader persuasion and social-threshold sprawl beyond the clearest current-vocabulary seams.
open_questions: Critical-mass is source-real nearby, but the first-order surface is cleanest around leverage-points and first-principles-thinking.
